title: Citrusy Velvety Light Polish Dish
description: A light and flavorful dish featuring a citrusy velvety sauce infused with ginger cordial for an aromatic twist, perfect as a breakfast or snack option.
instructions: Heat vegetable oil in a saucepan over medium heat. Add onion and garlic, sauté until translucent.
Stir in peanut butter, soy sauce, lemon zest, lime juice, turmeric powder, and freshly grated ginger (Ginger Powder).
Simmer for about 5 minutes, stirring occasionally to prevent sticking.
Blend mixture until smooth using an immersion blender. If blending in a regular blender, do it in batches to avoid overflowing the container.
Return to heat, reduce temperature to low, and add Ginger Cordial. Simmer for another minute or two until well combined and slightly thickened.
Serve with your favorite crackers or as a dip for veggies.
